top_signals.title: Watch: Trump swearing in Kevin Warsh as Fed chair as he seeks interest rate cuts
top_signals.summary: Despite President Donald Trump's demands for lower interest rates, markets are betting the Fed will stay on hold through most, if not all, of 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
